monitored_badge_issue.description: When adding a user with 'Monitored' role selected, the user appears in the list as 'Member' instead of showing the rose-colored 'monitored' badge
monitored_badge_issue.evidence: User added with child_monitored role selection, but displayed badge shows 'Member' instead of 'monitored'
monitored_badge_issue.impact: Users cannot visually identify child_monitored accounts in the admin panel
monitored_badge_issue.possible_cause: Backend may not be properly setting role to 'child_monitored', or frontend badge rendering logic issue

monitored_tab_access.description: Monitored tab is correctly visible only to owner users
monitored_tab_access.verification: Tab with data-testid='admin-tab-monitored' is accessible and shows empty state correctly

admin_functionality.description: Core admin panel functionality works correctly
admin_functionality.verification: User CRUD operations, tab navigation, activity log viewing all functional

summary.critical_issue: Monitored badge not displaying correctly for child_monitored users
summary.recommendation: Investigate backend role assignment and frontend badge rendering logic for child_monitored role
